weights.workload_multiplier_comment: Points per Deployment/StatefulSet. Logic: Managing the lifecycle of a controller.
weights.pod_multiplier_comment: Points per individual Pod. Logic: Scale and density overhead.
weights.pvc_multiplier_comment: Points per PersistentVolumeClaim. Logic: Data migration and storage class mapping (High Effort).
weights.network_ops_multiplier_comment: Points per Ingress/NetworkPolicy. Logic: Connectivity and security troubleshooting.

thresholds.tier_large_comment: Total score required to be classified as 'High Touch' (Large).
thresholds.tier_medium_comment: Total score required to be classified as 'Standard Touch' (Medium).
thresholds.tier_small_note: Any total score below 20 is automatically classified as 'Low Touch' (Small).
